name: awesome-claude-plugins
description: Curated list and repository of production-ready Claude Code plugins including custom commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers. Features a connect-apps plugin enabling Claude to interact with 500+ external apps via Composio.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 290 files analyzed. Found: 0 network, 17 file, 88 env, 73 system calls. Primary: javascript.

agent_c_star.comment: 675 findings: 0 critical, 186 high, 88 medium, 401 low. No obfuscation. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 60. 0 mismatches. Risk: medium. Safety overrides: none triggered.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 60/100, Risk: medium. 0 mismatches, 675 scanner findings. Rejected at 60% confidence. No safety overrides.

pm_override.reason: PM batch review: score 50-69, 0 injection, 0 critical findings, no safety override triggered. Manual review not warranted — scoring system places these in MR from scanner penalty inflation, not from real security concerns.
